files.notes: This file contains three distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for March. The first is Lesson I on Theology (A Nephite Colony), the second is Lesson II on Work and Business (including a Teachers' Topic and a poem 'Two Artists'), and the third is Lesson III on Literature (Autobiography of Joaquin Miller). Each lesson has clear boundaries and distinct subject matter.

files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for March. The first is Lesson III on Literature covering Joaquin Miller's autobiography, and the second is the beginning of Lesson IV on Social Service covering physical and mental diseases. The file appears to be cut off mid-sentence in the second lesson.
